name: studio.delete_redirect
description: Remove a URL redirect rule from an Actium Studio site.
whenToUse: Cleanup: a redirect is no longer needed because the destination page itself was removed.
Rollback: a recently-created redirect caused an unintended loop or SEO regression.
Consolidation: merging two redirects into one; remove the obsolete one after the replacement is verified.
whenNotToUse: The source URL is still receiving live traffic — deleting the redirect will 404 those requests; create a replacement first.
Caller wants to change the destination — use studio.update_redirect; deletion drops the rule entirely.
Caller is not sure which redirects exist — call studio.list_redirects first; deleting by id without verification risks removing the wrong rule.
